title: Shri Chandraghanta Mata Ki Aarti
intro: Read Shri Chandraghanta Mata Ki Aarti in Hindi and seek the divine blessings of Goddess Chandraghanta.
description:
Jai Maa Chandraghanta sukh dham,
Purn keejo mere kaam॥
Chandra samaj tu sheetal daati,
Chandra tej kirno mein samati॥
॥ Jai Maa Chandraghanta ॥

Man ki malak man bhati ho,
Chandraghanta tum var daati ho.
Sundar bhav ko lane wali,
Har sankat mein bachane wali॥
॥ Jai Maa Chandraghanta ॥

Har budhwar jo tujhe dhyaye,
Shraddha sahit jo vinay sunaye.
Murti Chandra aakar banaye,
Sanmukh ghee ki jyot jalaye॥
॥ Jai Maa Chandraghanta ॥

Sheesh jhuka kahe man ki baata,
Purn aas karo jagat data.
Kanchipur sthan tumhara,
Karnatika mein maan tumhara॥
॥ Jai Maa Chandraghanta ॥

Naam tera ratu maharani,
Bhakt ki raksha karo Bhavani॥
॥ Jai Maa Chandraghanta ॥

faq.q1: What is the significance of Maa Chandraghanta's Aarti?
faq.a1: Maa Chandraghanta is the destroyer of evil and the provider of peace. Her Aarti helps remove fear from the mind and increases courage.
faq.q2: Which is the most auspicious day for her worship?
faq.a2: The third day of Navratri (Tritiya) is dedicated to Maa Chandraghanta and is considered the most auspicious for her worship.
faq.q3: What offerings (Prasad) are preferred for Mother Chandraghanta during Aarti?
faq.a3: She is very fond of offerings made from milk, Kheer, and honey.
faq.q4: Can her Aarti be performed at home?
faq.a4: Yes, her Aarti can be performed with full purity and devotion in the home temple on the third day of Navratri.
faq.q5: Which mantra should be chanted after the Aarti?
faq.a5: Chanting 'Om Devi Chandraghantayai Namah' after the Aarti is very effective for mental peace and removing negativity.
